fewShots.question: How many patients do we have in the database
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS total_patients FROM dbo.person

fewShots.question: Show me the top 10 most common conditions by patient count
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 10 c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.condition_occurrence co JOIN dbo.concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY c.concept_name ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: Break down imaging studies by modality type with patient and study counts
fewShots.query: SELECT img.modality_source_value AS modality, COUNT(DISTINCT img.person_id) AS patient_count, COUNT(*) AS study_count FROM dbo.image_occurrence img GROUP BY img.modality_source_value ORDER BY study_count DESC

fewShots.question: How many female patients over 65 do we have
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.person WHERE gender_source_value = 'female' AND DATEDIFF(YEAR, birth_datetime, GETDATE()) > 65

fewShots.question: How many patients have a diagnosis of hypertension broken down by gender
fewShots.query: SELECT p.gender_source_value AS gender, COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.person p JOIN dbo.condition_occurrence co ON p.person_id = co.person_id JOIN dbo.concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name LIKE '%hypertension%' GROUP BY p.gender_source_value ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: Show the age and gender distribution of patients with any condition
fewShots.query: SELECT p.gender_source_value AS gender, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_datetime, GETDATE()) < 18 THEN '0-17' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_datetime, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 39 THEN '18-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_datetime, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 40 AND 64 THEN '40-64' ELSE '65+' END AS age_group, COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.person p JOIN dbo.condition_occurrence co ON p.person_id = co.person_id GROUP BY p.gender_source_value, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_datetime, GETDATE()) < 18 THEN '0-17' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_datetime, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 39 THEN '18-39' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_datetime, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 40 AND 64 THEN '40-64' ELSE '65+' END ORDER BY gender, age_group

fewShots.question: How many patients have had an MRI
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS mri_patient_count FROM dbo.image_occurrence WHERE modality_source_value = 'MR'

fewShots.question: Find all disease types that have associated imaging studies with the modality used and patient count
fewShots.query: SELECT c.concept_name AS condition_name, img.modality_source_value AS modality, COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.person p JOIN dbo.condition_occurrence co ON p.person_id = co.person_id JOIN dbo.concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id JOIN dbo.image_occurrence img ON p.person_id = img.person_id GROUP BY c.concept_name, img.modality_source_value ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: How many patients have had imaging across multiple modalities
fewShots.query: SELECT sub.person_id, sub.person_source_value, sub.modality_count, STRING_AGG(sub.modality, ', ') AS modalities FROM (SELECT DISTINCT p.person_id, p.person_source_value, img.modality_source_value AS modality, COUNT(DISTINCT img.modality_source_value) OVER (PARTITION BY p.person_id) AS modality_count FROM dbo.person p JOIN dbo.image_occurrence img ON p.person_id = img.person_id) sub WHERE sub.modality_count > 1 GROUP BY sub.person_id, sub.person_source_value, sub.modality_count ORDER BY sub.modality_count DESC

fewShots.question: Show me the top 10 most prescribed medications
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 10 c.concept_name AS medication, COUNT(DISTINCT de.person_id) AS patient_count, COUNT(*) AS prescription_count FROM dbo.drug_exposure de JOIN dbo.concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY c.concept_name ORDER BY prescription_count DESC

fewShots.question: What is the mortality rate among patients with cancer
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.person_id) AS deceased_cancer_patients, COUNT(DISTINCT co.person_id) AS total_cancer_patients, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT d.person_id) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT co.person_id), 0) * 100 AS mortality_rate_pct FROM dbo.condition_occurrence co JOIN dbo.concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id LEFT JOIN dbo.death d ON co.person_id = d.person_id WHERE c.concept_name LIKE '%cancer%'

fewShots.question: List patients with diabetes who also have imaging and show the modality breakdown
fewShots.query: SELECT img.modality_source_value AS modality, COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.person p JOIN dbo.condition_occurrence co ON p.person_id = co.person_id JOIN dbo.concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id JOIN dbo.image_occurrence img ON p.person_id = img.person_id WHERE c.concept_name LIKE '%diabetes%' GROUP BY img.modality_source_value ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: How many emergency room visits have there been and how many unique patients
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_er_visits, COUNT(DISTINCT vo.person_id) AS unique_patients FROM dbo.visit_occurrence vo JOIN dbo.concept c ON vo.visit_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name = 'Emergency Room Visit'

fewShots.question: Show me the count of patients by race and ethnicity
fewShots.query: SELECT race_source_value AS race, ethnicity_source_value AS ethnicity, COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.person GROUP BY race_source_value, ethnicity_source_value ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: Find conditions co-occurring with diabetes
fewShots.query: SELECT c2.concept_name AS co_occurring_condition, COUNT(DISTINCT co2.person_id) AS patient_count FROM dbo.condition_occurrence co1 JOIN dbo.concept c1 ON co1.condition_concept_id = c1.concept_id JOIN dbo.condition_occurrence co2 ON co1.person_id = co2.person_id AND co1.condition_concept_id != co2.condition_concept_id JOIN dbo.concept c2 ON co2.condition_concept_id = c2.concept_id WHERE c1.concept_name LIKE '%diabetes%' GROUP BY c2.concept_name ORDER BY patient_count DESC
